title: Mara Kickstart Venn
effect: Exhaust: gain 1 movement. If you spent scrap as fuel this turn, gain +1 movement.

title: Clank the Wrench
effect: Exhaust: repair 1 durability on a part, or install a part for 1 less scrap.

title: Skiv Scrap Leech
effect: Exhaust after you damage an enemy part: steal 1 scrap from that player.

title: Boss Rattlejaw
effect: Once each turn after you destroy an enemy part: gain 2 scrap.

title: Spiked Cowcatcher
effect: When you move into or through an adjacent enemy position, deal 1 damage to their Front part.

title: Chain Snagger
effect: When an enemy behind you moves adjacent, they lose 1 scrap or deal 1 damage to this part.

title: Left-Side Scrap Plates
effect: The first time each round your Left side would take damage, reduce it by 1.

title: Right-Side Boarding Hooks
effect: Exhaust a crew: deal 1 damage to an adjacent enemy side part. If it survives, gain 1 scrap.

title: Overfed Burner
effect: The first scrap you spend as fuel each round gives +2 movement instead of +1.

title: Rivet Spitter
effect: Attack range 1-2: deal 1 damage to a part facing you. If that part is already damaged, deal +1 damage.
